itBerries.title: MY APPROACH
itBerries.text: I build reliable back-end systems with clean architecture, thoughtful API design, and attention to performance and security.

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.text: I’m a back-end developer focused on building maintainable services and APIs. I enjoy solving real product problems, designing data models, and improving performance.
about.cardText: I can design the site based on your needs and suggestions. I can also design the site from scratch and consult you during the job.

approach.title: MY APPROACH
approach.text: I chose backend development consciously — I like owning core application logic, architecture, security, and stability. I enjoy taking responsibility for the project foundation and making it scalable and reliable.
